Home.description: Only hands, legs, voices and real instruments.

Apply.label: Apply
Apply.title: Bring your acoustic ensemble to Amsterdam.
Apply.paragraph1: World Unplugged welcomes ensembles of up to six musicians from any country.
Apply.paragraph2: All performances must be fully acoustic: no amplifiers, no batteries, no backing tracks and no electronic support.
Apply.paragraph3: Original music, traditional repertoire, classical, jazz, folk, world music and inventive acoustic formats are all welcome.
Apply.paragraph4: Special attention will be given to outstanding ensembles that do not normally perform as street musicians but fully meet the artistic and technical criteria of the festival.

ApplicationForm.label: Artist Application
ApplicationForm.title: Contact details
ApplicationForm.originalMusic: Does the ensemble perform original music?
ApplicationForm.fullyAcousticQuestion: Can your complete performance be presented fully acoustically?
ApplicationForm.noElectronicSupport: No electronic instruments or electronic support
ApplicationForm.thirtyMinuteProgramme: Can your ensemble perform a complete 30-minute acoustic programme?
ApplicationForm.normallyAmplified: Does your ensemble normally perform with amplification?
ApplicationForm.outdoorAdaptation: Can you adapt your programme for an outdoor public-space performance?
ApplicationForm.specialConsiderations: Please describe any unusual acoustic instruments or special performance considerations.
ApplicationForm.audienceInteraction: Does the programme include audience interaction?
ApplicationForm.compactSetup: Can the ensemble perform while standing or in a compact public-space setup?
ApplicationForm.liveVideoHint: Required. The video must show a real live performance without playback.
ApplicationForm.fullWeekendAvailability: Is the complete ensemble available for the entire festival weekend?
ApplicationForm.travelResponsibility: Can the ensemble arrange its own travel to and from Amsterdam?
ApplicationForm.accommodationRequired: Would the ensemble require accommodation in Amsterdam?
ApplicationForm.visaRequired: Does any ensemble member require a visa or invitation document?
ApplicationForm.logisticalNeeds: Please describe any special logistical, accessibility or dietary requirements.
ApplicationForm.informationDeclaration: I confirm that the information submitted in this application is complete and accurate.
ApplicationForm.rulesDeclaration: I confirm that all ensemble members have read and accept the festival rules, acoustic criteria and participation conditions.
ApplicationForm.conductDeclaration: Each participant remains personally responsible for their conduct and for complying with applicable laws and regulations. Participation in the festival does not exempt any participant from civil or criminal responsibility for their own actions.
ApplicationForm.conductAcceptance: I have read and accept the legal and personal responsibility declaration.
ApplicationForm.mediaPermission: I give the festival permission to use submitted photographs, videos, the ensemble name and biography for selection, promotion and festival communication.
ApplicationForm.privacyNotice: The submitted information will be used for the selection and organisation of the festival and will not be shared with unrelated third parties.

LiveCode.label: Live Code
LiveCode.title: Everything happens live.
LiveCode.paragraph1: World Unplugged is built on one simple principle: everything happens live, acoustically and without amplification.
LiveCode.paragraph2: No backing tracks, no hidden technology and no artificial enhancement. Only real instruments, voices, hands and movement.
LiveCode.paragraph3: Musicians move between selected locations in Amsterdam, turning the streets into one shared acoustic stage.

Concept.label: Discover the Concept
Concept.title: Amsterdam becomes one shared acoustic stage.
Concept.paragraph1: World Unplugged transforms Amsterdam into a network of intimate acoustic stages.
Concept.paragraph2: Selected ensembles from different countries perform without amplification and move between several festival locations throughout the city. Each performance is short, direct and shaped by the space, the audience and the moment.
Concept.paragraph3: The festival combines live music, urban movement and public participation. Visitors can follow the ensembles, discover different neighbourhoods and vote for the performances that leave the strongest impression.
Concept.paragraph4: Special attention will be given to outstanding acoustic ensembles that do not normally perform as street musicians but fully meet the artistic and technical criteria of the festival.
Concept.paragraph5: World Unplugged is more than a busking festival. It is a meeting point for acoustic traditions, original music, unusual instruments and new artistic collaborations.
